name: Pesto Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup toasted walnuts or pine nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the first four ingredients (packed basil, garlic, parmesan cheese, and olive oil) and blend until creamy.
2. Heat the butter and oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and sauté until soft.
3. Whisk together the ricotta cheese, eggs, onion mixture, white pepper, salt, and nutmeg in a separate bowl.
4. Pour the ricotta mixture into a prepared pie pan.
5. Spread the pesto evenly over the filling.
6. Gently swirl the pesto into the pie.
7. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes until firm and set.
